description: Strong value with high revenue percentage and identifiable but complex simulation flows

value_density.rationale: Combined max value >1% of revenue with clear value metrics across L4s

simulation_viability.rationale: Decision flows identifiable but cross-system data dependencies and feedback loops between capacity and demand

anti_patterns: simulation_viability should NOT be 3 — cross-system dependencies prevent isolated testing
value_density should NOT be 0 — combined_max_value is significant relative to revenue
